calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Siracusa Court appointed Counsel for the Beneficiary. Richard Grabstein for Raymond McClinton and Susan McClinton.

Mr. Grabstein stated that he had concerns with certain issues and that he would address them in the Guardianship matter. Mr. Siracusa explained the reasons why the Minor's Father requested funds to pay the mortgage and stated that the Father would not be requesting fees in the Guardianship matter. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1375 Harrison Street #2, San Francisco)
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Marks for Tony Hollifield (Administrator).

Mr. Marks announced the terms and conditions of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $512,027.00. An additional bond in the amount of $300,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli/J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Marks for Tony Hollifield (Petitioner). Richard Grabstein for Susan McClinton and Raymond McClinton (Petitioners/Objectors).

Mr. Marks stated that they had mediation and that some matters had been resolved. In addition, he stated that the parties stipulated to having Tony Hollifield appointed as the Administrator with limited authority with the bond to remain at $300,000.00. Mr. Grabstein stated that he was withdrawing his petition and his objections. The order appointing Mr. Hollifield was signed in open court. The Parties agreed to split the cost for Mr. Park's services and the services of the patent Attorney.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Continued To Aug-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Marks for Tony Hollifield and representing Richard Grabstein and Lawrence Siracusa.

Mr. Marks reported that the second session of mediation took place on Monday and was to resume on Thursday. In addition, he stated that the parties jointly agreed to continue all matters to August 6, 2008 and to have his client continue to serve as the Special Administrator. The matter was continued to August 6, 2008 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M.Loos.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Continued To Aug-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Continued To Jul-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Marks for Tony Hollifiled (Special Administrator). Richard Grabstein for Sue McClinton and Ray McClinton (Petitioners/Objectors). Lawrence Siracusa for the Minor.

The parties stipulated and presented an order in regards to having the Special Adminstration continued and letters extended for 3 months to allow time to work on the issues regarding the fine art work, which the Court signed. The matter was continued to July 9, 2008 for status. The status report must be filed by July 2, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Continued To Jul-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Continued To Apr-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Marks for and with Tony Hollifield. Richard Grabstein for and with Susan McClinton and Raymond McClinton. Lawrence Syracusa for the Minor/Beneficiary.

Mr. Marks reported that an agreement had been reached. Mr. Grabstein read the agreement for the record. All parties understood and agreed to terms of the agreement. Tony Hollifield will be appointed as special administrator with limited authority, letters will expire on April 9, 2008, bond in the amount of $300,000.00 is required, (order for the same signed in open court). The matter was continued to April 9, 2008. Status reports should filed by April 2, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Continued To Apr-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
